label: Auroral Scriptorium
description: Auroral Scriptorium is a narrow bedroom cut into the basalt-glass terracing of Cairnglass Eyrie, its walls scored by alignment grooves that preserve the residence’s calibrated sightlines toward the auroral girdle. A low sleeping plinth rises from a mirror-slag dais, while inset shelves and a recessed writing ledge occupy a single clean band of copper-white twilight held by finlike baffles. Electrostatic glass dust is pinned in deliberate gradients along the cornice and bed-steps, turning ordinary surfaces into fixed optical reference marks. A slit window of smoked crystal admits the system’s attenuated radiance in a constant, legible plane across the floor.
